subcodes.first_line: By God! The Lote-Tree of the Uttermost Boundary hath been stirred by the breathings of revelation from the Lord of Names, and mention of the Temple hath been raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله قد اهتزت سدره المنتهی من نفحات وحی مالک الاسماء و ارتفع ذکر المسجد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
